subject: FW: Patricia: Jeffrey
body:
From: Patricia Neville [mailto:sskkyy17@gmail.com] 
Sent: Friday, April 18, 2008 2:03 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Patricia: Jeffrey

 

Hi Lesley!

 

Hope this finds you well.  If you would pass this onto Jeffrey in the
near future it would be much appreciated!

Thank you,

Patricia

 

Jeffrey,

 

I called on the requested Friday a couple of weeks ago, but no response.

 

Need your assistance.  I just returned from Paris, Portofino, Monaco &
St. Tropez. Great trip. I have an opportunity for a side business to
charter a yacht  based out of St. Tropez. beginning May 1st.

 

If any of your friends/clients spend time in St. Tropez, would you be
willing to share my number (941-962-0385) in the hopes they may be
interested in chartering from me?  I've attached the info on the yacht
for your review.

 

Thoughts/Opinions?

 

  Patricia
body_html:
From: Patricia Neville [mailto:sskkyy17@gmail.com]
Sent: Friday, April 18, 2008 2:03 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Patricia: Jeffrey

 

Hi Lesley!

 

Hope this finds you well.  If you would pass this onto Jeffrey in the near future it would be much appreciated!

Thank you,

Patricia

 

Jeffrey,

 

I called on the requested Friday a couple of weeks ago, but no response.

 

Need your assistance.  I just returned from Paris, Portofino, Monaco & St. Tropez. Great trip. I have an opportunity for a side business to charter a yacht  based out of St. Tropez. beginning May 1st.

 

If any of your friends/clients spend time in St. Tropez, would you be willing to share my number (941-962-0385) in the hopes they may be interested in chartering from me?  I've attached the info on the yacht for your review.

 

Thoughts/Opinions?

 

  Patricia
